title: Off-payroll working in the public sector: reform of the intermediaries legislation
body: "This consultation is about reforming the intermediaries legislation to improve its effectiveness in the public sector.  It seeks views on the impacts of this change and design details of the policy, including a new process to help determine whether an intermediary is in scope of the rules.  The consultation asks for opinions on:   the scope of the reform of the intermediaries legislation how the reformed rules will work ways to minimise burdens on engagers who are affected   It also includes a summary of responses to the discussion paper published in 2015.  "
